about:
# About OneStreamer

## What is OneStreamer?

OneStreamer is a unique streaming platform where only **one user can be live at a time**. Anyone can instantly take over the stream by pressing the "Take Over Stream" button, creating a chaotic battle for the spotlight. To stay live, streamers must captivate their audience with creative content while viewers earn points by watching, chatting, or streaming themselves. These points can be spent on strategic items to protect or attack streams, fun effects to enhance the experience, and chat gambling features—making every moment unpredictable and interactive.

## 🚧 Alpha Release

OneStreamer is currently in **early release alpha**. This means the platform is still undergoing active development and testing. You may encounter bugs, incomplete features, or unexpected behavior as we work to improve the experience.

**Found a bug?** Please help us out by using the **Bug Report** button to let us know what went wrong. Your feedback is invaluable in making OneStreamer better for everyone!

## 👥 Our Team

OneStreamer is built by a small, passionate team working hard to bring you something truly unique in the streaming world. We're constantly adding new features, fixing issues, and listening to our community.

**Love what we're building?** We'd greatly appreciate any support you can offer—whether that's spreading the word, providing feedback, or simply being part of our growing community. Every bit of support helps us continue developing this wild streaming experiment!

---

*Thank you for being part of the OneStreamer journey! *
support:
# 🛠️ Support & Bug Reports

## Encountered an Issue?

Since OneStreamer is in active development, you might run into bugs or unexpected behavior. We appreciate your help in making the platform better!

## 🐛 Report Bugs

**Found a bug?** Click the **red bug icon** in the UI to file a bug report directly. This helps us track and fix issues quickly.

When reporting bugs, please include:
- What you were trying to do
- What actually happened
- Any error messages you saw

## 💬 Join Our Discord

For direct support, questions, or just to chat with the community, join our Discord server:

**🔗 [Join the OneStreamer Discord](https://discord.com/invite/As5CA3ekYA) **

Our team and community members are active on Discord and can provide:
- Real-time assistance
- Feature discussions
- Community updates
- General troubleshooting

## Quick Help

**Can't find the bug report button?** Look for the red bug icon in the main interface.

**Discord link not working?** Try copying and pasting: `https://discord.com/invite/As5CA3ekYA`

---

*Thanks for helping us improve OneStreamer! 🚀*
tutorial:
# 📺 OneStreamer Tutorial
## 🎮 How It Works

OneStreamer is a platform where only **one user can be live at a time**. Want to stream? You can take over the stream at any time by pressing the **"Take Over Stream"** button and then you'll become the streamer yourself.

Since anyone can go live and disrupt the stream at any time, you'll have to come up with novel and interesting ways to capture the audience's attention and not be booted offline.

## 💎 Earning Points

You can buy a variety of different items using **points** (💎). Points are earned as you:
- 👀 Watch the stream 
- 💬 Send messages in the chat
- 🎤 **Go live and stream** (fastest way!)

⚠️ *Note: only users who are registered and logged in can earn points and buy/use items.*

## 🏰 Strategic Items

The items that you can purchase using your points can be used to enhance or disrupt the stream! 

🛡️ **Guard Items:** Purchase Guard items to increase the global streaming cooldown timer ⏰ and prevent other users from taking over your stream. 

⚔️ **Attack Items:** Use Attack items as weapons to reduce the Global Cooldown timer while other streamers are live, speeding up their inevitable takeover.

## 🎊 Fun Stream Effects

You'll also find fun items that create effects on the stream:
- 🖍️ Draw on the streamer with **markers**
- 🍅 Throw a **tomato** at them  
- 🪩 Party under a **disco ball**
- 🌡️ Apply **thermal vision** filters
- 🙃 Flip the stream **upside down**

You can also trigger TTS and sound effects using specific items, such as the **📢 Megaphone** which enables TTS.

## 🎰 Chat Commands & Gambling

In addition, you can use your points to gamble in the chat 🎲. Type **!help** in the chat to see a full list of commands.

---

*Ready to join the chaos? The stream is waiting for someone bold enough to take it over!*

# OneStreamer Terms of Service

**Effective Date: August 24, 2025**  
**Last Updated: August 24, 2025**

## 1. Agreement to Terms

### 1.1 Acceptance
By accessing or using OneStreamer ("Platform," "Service," "we," "us," or "our"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access the Service.

### 1.2 Changes to Terms
We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. We will notify you of changes by posting the new Terms on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

## 2. Eligibility and Age Requirements

### 2.1 Minimum Age
You must be at least **13 years old** to use OneStreamer. In European Economic Area countries, the minimum age is **16 years old**. By using the Service, you represent and warrant that you meet these age requirements.

### 2.2 Parental Consent
If you are between 13 and 18 years old (or the age of majority in your jurisdiction), you may only use OneStreamer under the supervision of a parent or legal guardian who agrees to be bound by these Terms. Your parent or guardian is responsible for your activities on the Service.

### 2.3 Prohibited Users
The Service is not available to:
- Anyone under the minimum age requirement
- Previously banned or terminated users
- Anyone legally prohibited from using the Service

## 3. User Accounts

### 3.1 Account Creation
You must provide accurate, complete, and current information when creating your account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account.

### 3.2 Account Security
You agree to immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to protect your account information.

### 3.3 Account Ownership
**You do not own your OneStreamer account.** Your account is a license to use the Service that we can revoke at any time for any reason or no reason. You have no property rights in your account, username, or any data stored on our servers.

## 4. No Platform Responsibility for User Content

### 4.1 Complete Disclaimer of Responsibility
**ONESTREAMER IS A PLATFORM FOR USER-GENERATED CONTENT. WE DO NOT CREATE, ENDORSE, APPROVE, OR TAKE ANY RESPONSIBILITY FOR ANY CONTENT POSTED BY USERS.** We are merely a neutral platform providing streaming technology and infrastructure.

### 4.2 User Content Disclaimer
**ALL USER CONTENT IS THE SOLE RESPONSIBILITY OF THE PERSON WHO ORIGINATED SUCH CONTENT.** OneStreamer:
- Does not pre-screen or review content before it appears on the platform
- Is not responsible for any user content, whether legal or illegal
- Makes no guarantees about the accuracy, quality, or legality of user content
- Has no obligation to monitor user content
- Cannot guarantee that objectionable content will be removed promptly or at all

### 4.3 Third-Party Liability
**YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT ONESTREAMER SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR CONTENT OR THE DEFAMATORY, OFFENSIVE, OR ILLEGAL CONDUCT OF ANY THIRD PARTY.** You assume all risk of injury or damage from viewing or interacting with any content on the platform.

## 5. Prohibited Content and Conduct

### 5.1 Zero Tolerance Content
You may not stream, upload, share, or promote content that contains or depicts:

**a) Nudity and Pornography**
- No nudity, pornography, or sexually explicit content
- No sexual services or solicitation
- No content intended for sexual arousal or gratification

**b) Illegal Activities**
- No content depicting, promoting, or instructing illegal activities
- No sale or promotion of illegal drugs, controlled substances, or drug paraphernalia
- No content that violates any local, state, national, or international law

**c) Violence**
- No graphic violence, gore, or death
- No content that encourages, promotes, or provides instructions for self-harm or suicide
- No threats of violence against any person or group
- No content that encourages or incites violence

**d) Animal Abuse**
- No content depicting animal cruelty, abuse, or harm
- No content promoting animal fighting or other illegal animal activities

**e) Hate Speech**
- No content that promotes discrimination, hatred, or violence based on race, ethnicity, national origin, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic
- No use of hate symbols or imagery
- No content that dehumanizes individuals or groups

**f) Drug Use**
- No content depicting or promoting recreational drug use
- No content providing instructions for manufacturing or obtaining illegal drugs
- No content glamorizing or encouraging drug abuse

### 5.2 Additional Prohibited Conduct
You may not:
- Harass, bully, threaten, or intimidate other users
- Share personal information of others without consent (doxxing)
- Impersonate any person or entity
- Engage in any form of fraud or deception
- Violate intellectual property rights
- Interfere with or disrupt the Service
- Use automated systems or bots without permission
- Circumvent any content restrictions or security features

### 5.3 Enforcement
**We reserve the absolute right to remove any content and terminate any account at any time, for any reason or no reason, with or without notice.** Violations may result in:
- Content removal
- Temporary suspension
- Permanent account termination
- Reporting to law enforcement

## 6. Content Licensing and Rights

### 6.1 Your Content Rights
You retain ownership of content you create. However, by using OneStreamer, you grant us a **worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, sublicensable, transferable, perpetual, and irrevocable license** to use, reproduce, distribute, prepare derivative works of, display, and perform your content in connection with the Service.

### 6.2 License Scope
This license allows us to:
- Display your content on the platform
- Create clips, highlights, or promotional materials
- Store and backup your content
- Distribute your content through our Service
- Monetize the platform (though not necessarily your specific content)

### 6.3 Content Representations
By posting content, you represent and warrant that:
- You own or have all necessary rights to the content
- Your content does not violate these Terms
- Your content does not infringe any third-party rights
- You have obtained all necessary consents and releases

## 7. Copyright and DMCA

### 7.1 Copyright Policy
We respect intellectual property rights and expect users to do the same. We will respond to valid DMCA takedown notices and have adopted a repeat infringer policy.

### 7.2 DMCA Notices
To report copyright infringement, submit a DMCA notice through our designated copyright reporting system.

Your notice must include:
- Identification of the copyrighted work
- Identification of the infringing material
- Your contact information
- A statement of good faith belief
- A statement of accuracy under penalty of perjury
- Your physical or electronic signature

### 7.3 Repeat Infringer Policy
Users who receive **three copyright strikes** will have their accounts permanently terminated. Counter-notifications may be submitted if you believe content was removed in error.

## 8. Disclaimers and Limitations of Liability

### 8.1 Service Provided "AS IS"
**THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND.** We disclaim all warranties, express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

### 8.2 No Liability for User Content
**WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY USER CONTENT, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO:**
- Errors, mistakes, or inaccuracies in content
- Personal injury or property damage resulting from accessing or using the Service
- Unauthorized access to or alteration of your content
- Statements or conduct of any third party on the Service
- Any other matter relating to user-generated content

### 8.3 Limitation of Liability
**IN NO EVENT SHALL ONESTREAMER, ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, OR AGENTS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES** resulting from:
- Your use or inability to use the Service
- Any content obtained from the Service
- Unauthorized access to your account or data
- Any conduct or content of any third party
- Any matter related to the Service

### 8.4 Essential Basis of Bargain
These limitations reflect a reasonable allocation of risk and form an essential basis of the bargain between us. The Service would not be provided without these limitations.

## 9. Indemnification

### 9.1 Your Indemnification Obligation
**You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless OneStreamer and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or expenses (including attorney's fees) arising from:**
- Your use of the Service
- Your violation of these Terms
- Your violation of any third-party rights
- Any content you post or share
- Any harm caused by your actions or content

### 9.2 Defense Cooperation
You agree to cooperate fully in the defense of any claim and allow us to assume the exclusive defense and control of any matter subject to indemnification by you.

## 10. Account Termination

### 10.1 Termination by You
You may terminate your account at any time by ceasing use of the Service and deleting your account through account settings.

### 10.2 Termination by Us
**We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason whatsoever, including without limitation:**
- Breach of these Terms
- Violation of our Community Guidelines
- Repeated copyright infringement
- Illegal activity
- At our sole discretion

### 10.3 Effects of Termination
Upon termination:
- Your right to use the Service ceases immediately
- We may delete your content and account data
- You remain liable for any outstanding obligations
- Indemnification and limitation of liability provisions survive

### 10.4 No Refunds
Termination does not entitle you to any refunds for any purchases, subscriptions, or services.

## 11. Dispute Resolution

### 11.1 Governing Law
These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

### 11.2 Mandatory Arbitration
**ANY DISPUTE ARISING FROM THESE TERMS OR THE SERVICE SHALL BE RESOLVED THROUGH BINDING INDIVIDUAL ARBITRATION** rather than in court, except for claims qualifying for small claims court.

### 11.3 Class Action Waiver
**YOU WAIVE YOUR RIGHT TO PARTICIPATE IN A CLASS ACTION LAWSUIT OR CLASS-WIDE ARBITRATION.** All disputes must be brought in your individual capacity.

### 11.4 Arbitration Process
Arbitration will be conducted by the American Arbitration Association (AAA) under its Consumer Arbitration Rules. The arbitration will be held in Delaware or at another mutually agreed location.

### 11.5 Opt-Out Right
You may opt out of arbitration by sending written notice to our legal department within 30 days of first accepting these Terms.

## 12. Privacy and Data

### 12.1 Privacy Policy
Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated by reference into these Terms.

### 12.2 Data Processing
By using the Service, you consent to the collection, use, and sharing of your information as described in our Privacy Policy.

### 12.3 International Data Transfer
Your information may be transferred to and maintained on servers located outside your country of residence. By using the Service, you consent to such transfers.

## 13. Intellectual Property

### 13.1 Platform Content
The Service and its original content (excluding user content), features, and functionality are owned by OneStreamer and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

### 13.2 Trademarks
Our trademarks and trade dress may not be used without our prior written permission.

### 13.3 Feedback
Any feedback, suggestions, or ideas you provide about the Service become our property and may be used without compensation to you.

## 14. Monetization and Payments

### 14.1 Platform Monetization Rights
**OneStreamer has the exclusive right to monetize the Service**, including placing advertisements on or around content.

### 14.2 Creator Monetization
Any creator monetization programs are subject to separate agreements and may be modified or discontinued at any time.

### 14.3 Virtual Items
Any virtual items, currency, or goods are licensed, not owned, and have no real-world value.

## 15. Third-Party Services

### 15.1 Third-Party Links
The Service may contain links to third-party websites or services that are not owned or controlled by OneStreamer. We have no control over and assume no responsibility for such third-party services.

### 15.2 Third-Party Content
We are not responsible for examining or evaluating third-party content, and we do not warrant or endorse any third-party content.

## 16. Service Modifications

### 16.1 Changes to Service
We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the Service at any time without notice or liability.

### 16.2 Feature Changes
We may add, modify, or remove features and functionality without notice.

## 17. General Provisions

### 17.1 Entire Agreement
These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and OneStreamer regarding the Service and supersede all prior agreements.

### 17.2 Severability
If any provision of these Terms is found unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.

### 17.3 No Waiver
Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms shall not be considered a waiver of those rights.

### 17.4 Assignment
You may not assign or transfer these Terms or your rights under them. We may assign our rights to any of our affiliates or successors.

### 17.5 Survival
Provisions that by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity, and limitations of liability.

## 18. Contact Information

For questions about these Terms, please contact us through the appropriate channels available on the OneStreamer platform.

**OneStreamer Legal Department**

---

**BY USING ONESTREAMER, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ, UNDERSTOOD, AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THESE TERMS OF SERVICE.**

**REMEMBER: ONESTREAMER TAKES NO RESPONSIBILITY FOR USER-GENERATED CONTENT. VIEW AND INTERACT WITH CONTENT AT YOUR OWN RISK.**
privacy:
# OneStreamer Privacy Policy

**Effective Date: August 25, 2025**  
**Last Updated: August 25, 2025**

## Introduction

This Privacy Policy explains how OneStreamer ("we," "us," "our") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our streaming platform. By using OneStreamer, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

## Information We Collect

### Information You Provide

**Account Information**  
When you create an account, we collect your username, email address, and password. We need this information to create your account and to communicate with you about the service.

**Content You Create**  
We collect the content you stream, videos you upload, and messages you send in chat. Your streams and chat messages in public streams are visible to all viewers.

**Payment Information**  
If you make purchases or receive payments as a streamer, we collect billing information and transaction history. We use third-party payment processors who handle your payment data securely.

**Support Communications**  
When you contact our support team, we keep records of your communications to help resolve your issues.

### Information Collected Automatically

**Device Information**  
We collect information about your device, including device type, operating system, browser version, and language preferences. This helps us optimize our platform for your setup.

**Usage Data**  
We track how you use OneStreamer, including which streams you watch, how long you watch them, and your search queries. This helps us improve our services and recommend content.

**Location Information**  
We collect your IP address and approximate location (city level) to deliver content from nearby servers and comply with regional restrictions.

**Cookies**  
We use cookies to keep you logged in, remember your preferences, and understand how you use our platform. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

## How We Use Your Information

### To Provide Our Services
- Create and secure your account
- Deliver streaming content
- Process payments
- Enforce our community guidelines
- Enable communication between users

### To Improve Our Platform
- Analyze usage patterns
- Fix technical issues
- Develop new features
- Prevent fraud and abuse

### To Communicate With You
- Send security alerts about your account
- Notify you about service updates

## Who We Share Information With

### Public Sharing
Your username, profile picture, and public streams are visible to everyone. Remember that anything you share publicly can be seen and recorded by others.

### Service Providers
We share information with companies that help us run our platform:
- Payment processors for transactions
- Cloud storage providers for video hosting
- Email services for communications
- Security services for platform protection

These providers are required to protect your data and use it only to provide services to us.

### Legal Requirements
We may share information when required by law, including:
- Valid court orders and subpoenas
- Emergency situations involving safety
- Copyright claims under the DMCA

### Business Transfers
If OneStreamer is sold or merged with another company, your information may be transferred. We'll notify you before this happens.

## Your Privacy Rights

### Access Your Information
You can view your account information, watch history, and payment records through your account settings.

### Update Your Information
You can update your profile, email, and privacy preferences anytime in your account settings.

### Delete Your Information
You can delete individual content or your entire account. When you delete your account, we remove your personal information after a grace period. Some information may be retained for legal compliance.

### Regional Privacy Rights
Depending on where you live, you may have additional rights:

**European Union (GDPR)**: You can request data portability, object to processing, and lodge complaints with data protection authorities.

**California (CCPA)**: You can request information about our data practices and exercise rights without discrimination.

## Data Retention

We keep your information only as long as necessary:
- Active account data: While your account exists
- Content you create: Until you delete it
- Watch history: Automatically deleted periodically
- Support communications: Retained for a reasonable period
- Financial records: As required for tax and legal compliance

## Children's Privacy

OneStreamer is not available to children under 13. In the European Economic Area, the minimum age is 16. If we discover an account belongs to someone underage, we immediately terminate it and delete all data.

## Cookies and Tracking

We use different types of cookies:
- **Essential cookies**: Required for the platform to function
- **Functional cookies**: Remember your preferences
- **Analytics cookies**: Help us understand usage patterns

You can manage cookies through your browser settings, though disabling essential cookies will prevent you from using certain features.

## International Data Transfers

OneStreamer operates globally. Your data may be processed in any country where we or our service providers operate. We protect your data during international transfers through appropriate safeguards and agreements.

## Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information:
- Encryption of data in transit and at rest
- Access controls and authentication
- Regular security audits
- Incident response procedures

You can enhance your account security by:
- Using a strong, unique password
- Reviewing your account activity regularly
- Reporting suspicious activity immediately

## Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We'll notify you of significant changes via email or platform notification. Your continued use after changes means you accept the updated policy.

## Contact Us

For privacy-related questions or requests, contact us through the appropriate channels on the OneStreamer platform.

**OneStreamer Privacy Team**

For regulatory complaints:
- EU residents: Contact your local data protection authority
- California residents: Contact the California Privacy Protection Agency
- Other regions: Contact your local privacy regulator

---

**Your privacy is important to us.** We're committed to protecting your information and being transparent about our practices.

**Policy Version**: 1.0  
**Effective Date**: August 25, 2025

© 2025 OneStreamer, Inc. All rights reserved.
